mapper.select: select count(*) from product p ,CUS_ORDER c where p.p_num = c.p_num
select count(*) from member where M_status=2002
select * from (select * from product p ,CUS_ORDER c , member m where p.p_num = c.co_p_num and m.m_id = p.p_m_id and m.m_id = c.co_m_ID and M_status like '%' || 2002 || '%')
select * from (select count(*) from product p ,CUS_ORDER c , member m where p.p_num = c.co_p_num and m.m_id = p.p_m_id and m.m_id = c.co_m_ID and M_status like '%' || 2002 || '%')

select * from (select b.* , rownum r from (select * from product p ,CUS_ORDER c , member m where p.p_num = c.co_p_num and m.m_id = p.p_m_id and m.m_id = c.co_m_ID and M_status like '%' || 2002 || '%') b ) where r >= #{start} and r <= #{end}

select * from (select b.* , rownum r from ((select * from (select order_p_num,count(*) count from m_order group by order_p_num) ck ,product p,meat_category mc where ck.order_p_num=p.p_num and mc.meat_p_category=p.p_category order by count desc) b) where mod((meat_p_category),100)>=20) where r >= 1 and r <= 4

select * from (select b.* , rownum r from ((select * from (select order_p_num,count(*) count from m_order group by order_p_num) ck ,product p,meat_category mc where ck.order_p_num=p.p_num and mc.meat_p_category=p.p_category order by count desc) b) where mod((meat_p_category),100)<20) where r >= 1 and r <= 4
select count(*) from product order by p_reg_date desc
select * from product order by p_reg_date desc
select * from (select b.* , rownum r from (select * from product order by p_reg_date desc) b) where r >= #{start} and r <= #{end}

select count(*) from (select * from product p, p_detail d where p.p_num = d.pd_p_num and (p_name like '%' || #{search} || '%')) (p_name like '%' || #{search} || '%' or pd_P_DESC like '%' || #{search} || '%'))

select * from (select b.* , rownum r from (select * from product p, p_detail d where p.p_num = d.pd_p_num and p_name like '%' || #{search} || '%' (p_name like '%' || #{search} || '%' or pd_P_DESC like '%' || #{search} || '%') order by p_reg_date asc ) b ) desc ) b ) where r >= #{start} and r <= #{end}

select * from (select b.* , rownum r from (select * from product p, p_detail d where p.p_num = d.pd_p_num and p_name like '%' || #{search} || '%' (p_name like '%' || #{search} || '%' or pd_P_DESC like '%' || #{search} || '%') order by (p_price/weight)*100 asc ) b ) desc ) b ) where r >= #{start} and r <= #{end}

select * from (select b.* , rownum r from ((select * from (select order_p_num,count(*) count from m_order group by order_p_num) ck ,product p, p_detail d where ck.order_p_num=p.p_num and p.p_num=d.pd_p_num order by count desc) b) where p_name like '%' || #{search} || '%' ) where p_name like '%' || #{search} || '%' or pd_P_DESC like '%' || #{search} || '%' ) where r >= #{start} and r <= #{end}
select count(*) from (select * from product p, p_detail d where p.p_num=d.pd_p_num and p_category like '%_' || #{category} || '_%')

select.if: select * from (select b.* , rownum r from (select * from product p, p_detail d where p.p_num=d.pd_p_num and p_category like '%_' || #{category} || '_%' order by (p_price/weight)*100 ${price}) b) where r >= #{start} and r <= #{end}

select * from (select b.* , rownum r from (select * from product p, p_detail d where p.p_num=d.pd_p_num and p_category like '%_' || #{category} || '_%' order by p_reg_date ${reg} ) b) where r >= #{start} and r <= #{end}

select * from (select b.* , rownum r from ((select * from (select order_p_num,count(*) count from m_order group by order_p_num) ck ,product p,meat_category mc , p_detail d where ck.order_p_num=p.p_num and mc.meat_p_category=p.p_category and p.p_num=d.pd_p_num order by count ${sale} ) b ) where meat_p_category like '%_' || #{category} || '_%') where r >= #{start} and r <= #{end}
